name: set_noc_phase
short_description: Add/modify a phase to all traffic paths within the provided phase group.
full_help:
set_noc_phase

Description: 
Add/modify a phase to all traffic paths within the provided phase group.

Syntax: 
set_noc_phase  [-phase_group <arg>] [-phase <arg>] [-master_instance <arg>]
               [-slave_instance <arg>] [-read_bandwidth <arg>]
               [-write_bandwidth <arg>] [-mode <arg>] [-port <arg>] [-quiet]
               [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name                Description
  -------------------------------
  [-phase_group]      Name of the phase group which will include or already 
                      contain the provided phase
                      Default: Group_Default
  [-phase]            Name of the phase to add or modify
                      Default: Phase_Default
  [-master_instance]  The master instance of the traffic path to add or 
                      modify the provided phase
  [-slave_instance]   The slave instance of the traffic path to add or modify
                      the provided phase
  [-read_bandwidth]   The read bandwidth of the phase to add or modify
                      Default: 0
  [-write_bandwidth]  The write bandwidth of the phase to add or modify
                      Default: 0
  [-mode]             Determines whether this is a read(READ)/write(WRITE) 
                      phase or both(ALL).
                      Default: ALL
  [-port]             Specifies the port of a slave instance the traffic path
                      connects to.
                      Default: PORT0
  [-quiet]            Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]          Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
NOC
